title: Ukrainian Meat Dumplings
description: A hearty Ukrainian dish featuring meat dumplings served in a savory broth, typically served as a comfort food during colder months.

ingredients.name: Ground Meat
ingredients.notes: Beef or a combination of beef and pork works well

ingredients.name: Chewy Bread
ingredients.notes: Optional, adds thickness to the broth

instructions: 1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
2. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the ground meat and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
4. Add the chopped bread (if using), salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
5. Add the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. While the broth is simmering, prepare the dumplings according to package instructions.
8. Once the broth is ready, add the prepared dumplings and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
